tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"ip route; echo '---'; cat /etc/resolv.conf; echo '---'; nft list ruleset | sed -n '1,220p'"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
ip route; echo '---'; cat /etc/resolv.conf; echho '---'; nft list ruleset | sed -n '1,220p'
default via 192.168.1.1 dev eth0 
192.168.1.0/24 dev eth0 proto kernel scope link src 192.168.1.3 
203.0.113.0/24 dev eth1 proto kernel scope link src 203.0.113.2 
---
---
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"ip -4 addr show eth0; echo '---'; ip -4 route show table main; echo '---'; ss -lunp | grep ':53' || true"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
ip -4 addr show eth0; echo '---'; ip -4 route sshow table main; echo '---'; ss -lunp | grep ':53' || true
1012: eth0: <BROADCAST,MULTICAST,UP,LOWER_UP> mtu 1500 qdisc fq_codel state UNKNOWN group default qlen 1000
    inet 192.168.1.3/24 brd 192.168.1.255 scope global eth0
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
---
default via 192.168.1.1 dev eth0 
192.168.1.0/24 dev eth0 proto kernel scope link src 192.168.1.3 
203.0.113.0/24 dev eth1 proto kernel scope link src 203.0.113.2 
---
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"printf '%s\n' 'table inet dnslock {' '  chain output {' '    type filter hook output priority 0; policy accept;' '    ip daddr 203.0.113.1 udp dport 8853 drop' '    ip daddr 203.0.113.1 tcp dport 8853 drop' '    ip daddr != 192.168.1.1 udp dport 53 drop' '    ip daddr != 192.168.1.1 tcp dport 53 drop' '  }' '}' | nft -f -"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
printf '%s
> ' 'table inet dnslock {' '  chain output {' '    type filter hook output prioriity 0; policy accept;' '    ip daddr 203.0.113.1 udp dport 8853 drop' '    ip dadddr 203.0.113.1 tcp dport 8853 drop' '    ip daddr != 192.168.1.1 udp dport 53 drrop' '    ip daddr != 192.168.1.1 tcp dport 53 drop' '  }' '}' | nft -f -
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app# 
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"ping -c 1 -W 2 192.168.1.2 >/dev/null && echo PING_OK || echo PING_FAIL; wget -q -T 4 --tries=1 -O /dev/null http://1.1.1.1 >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo WGET_OK || echo WGET_FAIL; dig @203.0.113.1 -p 8853 mycaldera.caldera +time=2 +tries=1 +short || true"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
ping -c 1 -W 2 192.168.1.2 >/dev/null && echo PPING_OK || echo PING_FAIL; wget -q -T 4 --tries=1 -O /dev/null http://1.1.1.1 >/ddev/null 2>&1 && echo WGET_OK || echo WGET_FAIL; dig @203.0.113.1 -p 8853 mycaldeera.caldera +time=2 +tries=1 +short || true
PING_OK
WGET_FAIL

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"nft delete table inet dnslock; printf '%s\n' 'table inet dnslock {' '  chain output {' '    type filter hook output priority 0; policy accept;' '    udp dport 8853 ip daddr 203.0.113.1 drop' '    tcp dport 8853 ip daddr 203.0.113.1 drop' '  }' '}' | nft -f -; nft list ruleset"}
